name: Sliced Beef with Sesame Seeds
recipeIngredient: 500 ml bottle of Chinese spice sauce
1 tbsp Fen Chiew Chinese wine (or Shaoxing wine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade and marinate beef shin for at least 24 hours.
2. Cook the beef shin in boiling water for 10 minutes, then remove. Simmer in the spice sauce for 75 minutes (a special sauce would be prepared in a restaurant kitchen; bottled sauce is recommended for home cooking). Remove, cool, and freeze (ideally using a slicing machine) for easier slicing.
3. Stir-fry sesame seeds in a dry wok until golden, then set aside.
4. Thinly slice the frozen beef shin and deep-fry in hot oil over medium flame until crisp.
5. Melt sugar in 2 tsp water in another wok, add beef slices, and stir-fry until no liquid remains.
6. Sprinkle sesame seeds and sesame oil over the slices while still hot. Gently mix and transfer to a serving dish.
